OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: OpenRouter API key for AI analysis

GH_TOKEN.description: GitHub personal access token for GraphQL API

VOD_PASSWORD.description: Password to access the VoD Analyzer UI

BRIGHTDATA_API_KEY.description: Bright Data API key (dashboard → Account → API Token)

BRIGHTDATA_ZONE.description: Bright Data Web Unlocker zone name (defaults to web_unlocker1 if not set)
